text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rice Shower has finished training for the day.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're not going home?
choice_data_list: I have to do some prep for training tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're not going home?
choice_data_list: I have to do some prep for training tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You mean you're still working... because of me?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You mean you're still working... because of me?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Okay, I understand. See you tomorrow then...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Okay, I understand. See you tomorrow then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I finish my preparations for tomorrow's training
session and start to head home. That's when I spy
Rice Shower running on the track.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... More, more... You have to work harder, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh... Big Brother. You found me...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh... Big Sister. You found me...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Since you're working so hard for me, I have to
keep working hard too.
choice_data_list: Then let's train together for a bit.
Just your concern is enough for me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Since you're working so hard for me, I have to
keep working hard too.
choice_data_list: Then let's train together for a bit.
Just your concern is enough for me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Okay... Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Okay... Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch over Rice Shower as she does her
additional training.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But that's not enough... I want to be of some use
to you.
choice_data_list: Well, it'll sure be lonely walking home by myself...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But that's not enough... I want to be of some use
to you.
choice_data_list:
Well, it'll sure be lonely walking home by my
self...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh... Then, why don't I go with yo—ah!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I have to go change first, but if you wait right
here, I'll be back in no time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower eventually returns, and we make our
way back home.
